summary: Iteration 56 — Automatic main-lecturer assignment + lecturer_mode (main/training). Backend: 12/12 pytest tests PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_lecturer_auto_assign.py. Verified: (a) public booking on a gallery program auto-assigns the program's default lecturer with assignment_source='default_program' and non-empty assignment_reason, (b) when the only configured lecturer is switched to training_mode the same booking returns 409 with Czech message 'Pro tento termín není k dispozici žádný hlavní lektor…', (c) admin POST /api/bookings with manual assigned_lecturer_id → source='manual_admin', (d) admin POST /api/bookings with a training-mode assigned_lecturer_id → 400 (Czech 'Náslech' wording), (e) POST /api/bookings/{id}/assign-lecturer-admin rejects training-mode lecturer with 400 containing 'Náslech', (f) PATCH /api/team/{id}/lecturer-mode admin-only (403 for lecturer role), 400 for invalid value, 200 + updated mode for admin + reflected in GET /api/team, (g) GET /api/team returns lecturer_mode field for every member, (h) GET /api/bookings/{id} returns assignment_source + assignment_reason, (i) Regression: Test Muzeum public booking still 200. Frontend: Team page verified — 3 lecturer toggles (Anna, Petr, Klára) each with data-testid=lecturer-mode-toggle-{id}, admin Jana has NO toggle. Toggle flips text between 'Hlavní lektor' ↔ 'Náslech' and persists via PATCH /api/team/{id}/lecturer-mode (200). Code-inspected BookingsPage.js (lines 635-694): assignment-source-badge + assignment-reason testids present; lecturer dropdown filters `lecturer_mode === 'main'` so training members hidden. Visual verification of the badge in the booking side-panel was BLOCKED because the admin Bookings list page returns 500 (pre-existing unrelated pydantic validation error — see Issues).

critical.issue: Returns 500 — fastapi ResponseValidationError: 19 validation errors: 'age_or_class' Input should be a valid string (input: None). Some stored reservations have age_or_class=null but the Booking response schema (models/schemas.py:137) declares `age_or_class: str` (non-Optional). This fully blocks the admin Bookings list page (frontend shows 0 cards, UI cannot open a booking detail to display the new assignment-source-badge / assignment-reason). NOT introduced by this iteration, but surfaced during frontend verification.

minor.issue: Returns 405 Method Not Allowed — test cleanup (and presumably admin 'delete booking' UI) cannot remove test bookings. Appears to be an unimplemented route. Bookings can only be cancelled, not deleted, via the API currently.

ui_bugs.issue: Page renders empty (no booking rows) because GET /api/bookings returns 500 (see backend critical). Indirectly blocks visual verification of assignment-source-badge / assignment-reason. Code is correct (data-testid + color-coded classes verified by source inspection).

action_items: HIGH: Fix GET /api/bookings 500 — either make Booking.age_or_class Optional[str] in /app/backend/models/schemas.py OR backfill/COALESCE age_or_class in the query. Blocks the new assignment badge UI from being seen end-to-end.

Optional: Add overlap-scenario unit test for pick_main_lecturer where Petr has an existing overlapping reservation — in current seed Petr is the sole configured lecturer for his programs so a second booking on the same slot should return 409. Testing agent could not verify this end-to-end because GET /api/bookings 500 blocks easy booking-inventory inspection; a method-level test in /app/backend/tests would be more reliable than HTTP.
Consider adding DELETE /api/bookings/{id} (admin) or documenting cancel as the only removal path — test cleanup relies on it.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: pick_main_lecturer filters User.lecturer_mode=='main' + status=='active' + deleted_at IS NULL (services/lecturer_assignment_service.py:44-50). Training lecturers can NEVER be auto-picked.

VERIFIED: _resolve_main_lecturer in routes/bookings.py raises 409 with Czech 'Pro tento termín není k dispozici žádný hlavní lektor…' when pool exists but no one is available; returns source='unassigned' only when configured_count==0.
VERIFIED: admin_assign_lecturer_to_booking (routes/bookings.py:767) guards training mode with 400 + Czech 'Náslech' message.
VERIFIED: PATCH /api/team/{id}/lecturer-mode (routes/team.py:112-134) is admin-only (role in ['admin','spravce']), validates mode ∈ {'main','training'}.
VERIFIED: BookingsPage.js filters teamMembers.filter(m => (m.lecturer_mode || 'main') === 'main') in the Select dropdown — training lectors are hidden as expected.
VERIFIED: TeamPage.js toggle button only renders for lecturer/edukator roles (handleToggleLecturerMode + inline button rendering at line 347-355); admin Jana does NOT show the toggle.

MINOR: lecturer_assignment_service.pick_main_lecturer classifies source by substring match ('výchozí' in reason) — brittle if the Czech reason text is ever reworded. Consider returning source explicitly per branch rather than deriving from the reason string.

success_rate.frontend: Team page 100%, Bookings detail panel could not be visually tested due to unrelated GET /api/bookings 500 — code inspected and correct

seed_data_creation: Tests create 4 TEST_ bookings on dates 2028-06-02/11/16/21 + one on 2028-07-15 at Test Muzeum. DELETE /api/bookings/{id} returns 405 so they remain as pending reservations (TEST_AutoAssignSchool / TEST_autoassign@example.com — safe to filter by school_name prefix). All gallery lecturers are RESTORED to lecturer_mode='main' in an autouse session-scoped fixture teardown, so Klára/Anna/Petr are back to main at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run with `cd /app/backend && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://school-crm-pilot.preview.emergentagent.com pytest tests/test_lecturer_auto_assign.py -v`. Tests use dates 2028-06-01+N to avoid colliding with agent's 2027-09-15..30 smoke-test slots. Rate-limit on /api/bookings/public is 10/min — tests sleep/serialize appropriately. IMPORTANT: The GET /api/bookings 500 is orthogonal to this feature and existed before iteration 56 — when main agent fixes it (make age_or_class Optional[str] in schemas.py or backfill null rows), the full BookingsPage UI will light up and the assignment-source-badge + assignment-reason can be visually confirmed by clicking any existing booking.
rca of the issue: GET /api/bookings 500: fastapi response validation fails because Booking.age_or_class (models/schemas.py:137) is non-Optional `str`, but several historical rows in the `reservations` table have age_or_class = NULL (likely pre-this-feature). Fix: change `age_or_class: str` → `age_or_class: Optional[str] = None` in BookingBase (or in the list endpoint specifically), or backfill: UPDATE reservations SET age_or_class='' WHERE age_or_class IS NULL;
